Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Interface BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier

All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier,​Integer>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier,​Integer>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier,​Integer>, ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier,​Integer>
All Known Implementing Classes:
BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierImpl, BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierNoOp
public interface BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier
extends ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier,​Integer>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier,​Integer>
Verifies the requirements of a BigDecimal.precision().

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier isNegative()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value is always positive

    Deprecated.
    the actual value is always positive

    the actual value is always positive

    the actual value is always positive

    the actual value is always positive

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier

    isNotNull, isNull

  • Method Details

    • isZero

      @Deprecated BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier isZero()
      Deprecated.
      the actual value is always positive
      Ensures that the actual value is zero. -0.0 is considered to be equal to zero.
      Specified by:
      isZero in interface ExtensibleNumberVerifier<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier,​Integer>
      Returns:
      the updated verifier

    • isNotZero

      @Deprecated BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier isNotZero()
      Deprecated.
      the actual value is always positive
      Ensures that the actual value is not zero. -0.0 is considered to be equal to zero.
      Specified by:
      isNotZero in interface ExtensibleNumberVerifier<BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier,​Integer>
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
